creator: blacktravelpin
caption:
6 FREE spots to watch fireworks show in Dubai for New Year’s 2026

1. Burj Khalifa - Downtown Dubai
📍The world’s most iconic fireworks location.
⏱️ Show starts at 00:00.�💡Best viewing spots: Burj Park, the Dubai Mall
Promenade, Souk Al Bahar.

2. Dubai Frame
📍A striking contrast between old and new Dubai⏱️ Show starts at 00:00 (Includes fireworks +  drone show)
💡Best viewing spots: Zabeel Park

3.Burj Al Arab & 
📍Fireworks by the legendary hotel with sea views. ⏱️ 00:00 - clear views from Kite Beach, Jumeirah
Beach, and Umm Suqeim.

4. Bluewaters Island 
📍Vibrant island vibes with Ain Dubai skyline
⏱️ Show starts at 00:00
💡Best viewing spots: The Beach at JBR and visible to multiple directions

5. Palm Jumeirah & Atlantis The Palm
📍Fireworks and light displays over the island.
⏱️00:00, right at the countdown.

6.Dubai Festival City Mall
📍A high-energy waterfront show featuring the record-breaking IMAGINE laser and water display. ⏱️ Show starts at 00:00. 
💡Best viewing spots: Festival Bay (arrive early as this area fills up quickly)

Which one will you be heading? 
Let me know in the comments👇🏻

Follow @blacktravelpin for more Daily Dubai Vibes. 😍

📸: @jumeirahburjalarab
